title: Kimm systems
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Kimm}} {{Sector |image=[[File:KimmAurek-TEA.jpg]] |name=Kimm systems |region=*[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' **[[Senex-Juvex/Legends|Senex-Juvex]] ***[[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]] *[[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] |coordinates=L-18 |subsectors= |quadrants= |systems=*[[Kimm Aurek system/Legends|Kimm Aurek system]] *[[Kimm Besh system/Legends|Kimm Besh system]] *[[Kimm Cresh system/Legends|Kimm Cresh system]] |otherplanets= |moons= |stations= |asteroids= |comets= |nebulae= |routes=[[Senex-Juvex Loop]] |other= |species= |capital= |affiliation=[[House Sreethyn]] |battles1= |b1= |battles2= |b2= |battles3= |b3= |battles4= |b4= |battles5= |b5= |battles6= |b6= |battles7= |b7= |battles8= |b8= |battles9= |b9= }} {{Quote|I take it the ''Smelly Saint'' and ''Bella's Bosom'' are ships?''"
"''The ''Saint'' runs ripoff copy agri-droids out of the Kimm systems, sometimes slaves from the Senex Sector.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]}} The '''Kimm systems''' referred to a trio of [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], each with a shabby industrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the same name: [[Kimm Aurek]], [[Kimm Besh]], and [[Kimm Cresh]]. These three worlds belonged to [[House Sreethyn]] of the [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]]. The systems produced rip-off [[Agrirobot/Legends|agri-droids]] and shared their name with the epithet "[[Nemesis of the Kimm]]," one of the many titles bestowed upon the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Sharad Hett]]{{CSWECite|II|369|Nemesis of the Kimm}} by [[47 BBY/Legends|47 BBY]].[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] ==Appearances== *[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Star system groups]]
